title: My Dress-Up Darling
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12, 2022) + S2 (12, 2025) = 24. Manga complete at 119 chapters (main story ended at ch. 115; extras 116–119 collected in the final Volume 15, July 2025). The TV anime is a faithful, near-1:1 adaptation; S2 reorders/interleaves a few chapters so some ranges overlap slightly. S2 finale (ep 24) adapts through ch. 85–86; the unadapted tail (ch. 86–119) is included chapters-only. Slice-of-life cosplay romance — section groupings are by cosplay shoot and are approximate.

mappings.arc: Black Lobelia / Summer Festival Shoot (S1 finale)
